arts.ttl: Chelsea in DANGER as Bayern Munich pursue 'world class' star
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly “seriously” interested in signing Chelsea midfielder Andrey Santos amid concerns over his long-term future at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca is set to give Santos a chance to impress him during the upcoming Club World Cup, although the Italian has admitted that no decision has been made on his long-term future at Stamford Bridge.
